/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++ -g -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX14.2.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/chess_game.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chess_game.dir/Window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chess_game.dir/Board.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chess_game.dir/Move.cpp.o -o chess_game -F/Library/Frameworks  -Wl,-rpath,/Library/Frameworks -Xlinker -framework -Xlinker SDL2 -Xlinker -framework -Xlinker SDL2_image
